meta.title: Art Objects & Custom Paintings
meta.description: Original paintings and art objects by streetwave®. Street aesthetics brought to canvas and interiors.

hero.title: Art / Paintings
hero.subtitle: Original paintings and art objects. Street art translated onto canvas.

manifesto.title: Art beyond customization
manifesto.text:
Street Wave is more than customization. We operate at the intersection of art, fashion, and product design. Every object — whether sneakers, a canvas, or an installation — is a statement.

We transform street culture into collectible art. We collaborate with artists who think beyond the canvas — in the space between digital, physical, and everything in between.

Custom objects, in our view, aren't decoration. They are art pieces, each carrying an idea, context, and a signature voice.

artist.name: StereoBoogie
artist.bio: A multidisciplinary artist working at the intersection of digital and physical. Paintings, objects, customs, installations. Core themes — identity, digital anxiety, the post-human condition.
